phpminiadmin-1.9.160630.patch

* Update to 1.9.160630
* Update distinfo
* Remove IGNORE_WITH_PHP=70 by changing USE_PHP to have mysqli instead of mysql (tested that phpminiadmin still works with only mysqli)
